item.title: It's Mjonday, that means we all have a little something to do. Here's the 237sh eromeme album to make it a bit easier!
item.description:
Last week was rough. Just work. So much work. But my job is good to me so if every now and again I gotta work extra, I think that is fine. It keeps the scales balanced. Just as a general update, I haven't been getting as much new material so I'm restricted to Mjondays only for a bit. It's unfortunate but it's a side affect of not wanting to pilfer my fellow smut dumpers and step on their toes. I know they don't mind but it's just not who I wanna be. They've earned the spotlight. As usual, here's the stuff. No OC, just things found in my filing cabinet.
Quack!
Oops. Not sexy, just cute. Not deleting it. I like cute.
OK, that's all people! Try something new. Often. The makeup of a person depends on the sum of their experiences. Try new stuff so you have a lot of experiences. New hobbies, visit new places, new foods, new positions ;). It helps broaden your view of the world. May your way be Green and Golden! Here's the archive. It's up to date! http://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: "That's what followers of every religion says."
item.description: There are currently genocides going on with religion as the listed cause. Because people want their religion dominant, because religion is a tool to control people. Religions are tools. Tools to make people subservient. Let's all grow up please. Please. Please.

item.title: The 431st vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
This week I am promoting an online friend's Twitch Stream and Cat Surgery Fundraiser @ElbowDeepInPackages (Amazon shipments, not genitals) Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/erosrogziel She will be starting her streaming this week around 6-7 pm EST Game Schedule: Mon- Wild Card Day Tue- Stardew Valley Wed- Wild Card Day Thu- Risk Of Rain 2 Fri- Terraria Sat- Shellshock Sun- Valorant Fundraiser: https://www.paypal.com/pools/c/93Wy48Im0r The catto needs a semi-expensive tooth extraction, about $900 USD, more if they find more problems once it's removed.
#7 What's your favorite lizard and why? Mine is a toss-up between the Bearded Dragon and the Komodo Dragon. Both for how they eat.Beardie: can grab live food with incredible speed *with it's fuckin hands*! Komodo: Fuckin bite something and follow as it dies of infection
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in AbbiiStabbii, ElbowDeepInAHorse and PotatoCheesMonk's Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays.
*word for word
I turned 40 this year. These are horrifically accurate.
Good to know
I added the text at the bottom and top. I know the picture is from Antiques Roadshow
So Betty White and which other one?
There is no Economy. Only Bog
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales

item.title: McDonalds Is The Worst
item.description: I find it funny the Ad I see the most on Imgur is also at the top of this price increase chart over the years. I know Imgur needs money to operate, but is there any other way that wouldn't screw the general public? Also curious to see if this gets downvoted or flagged by mods

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 24
item.description:
Hello everyone! Remember! You can click on a image, and click on the comment bubble to either comment on it, with the link already made for you, or see what number the image is! If you knew this already, awesome! If not, well now you know! <3 (this doesn't work on the old site layout. Sorry)
Yes.
AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA!
Hope today is at least bearable for you. If not, I hope tomorrow is significantly better.

item.title: Always observe contractors at work
item.description:
This is what the gutters looked like after I paid $175 for gutter cleaning. Last winter after all of the leaves had fallen, I paid $175 for gutter cleaning. I stayed in the house. The workers spent less than 15 minutes 'cleaning' the gutters. The next time there was a big rain, the water came over the gutters like Niagara Falls.
I could have grown a garden in the gutters.
Gutters after clearing out the debris and using a hose to wash the gutters. I hired a different company this spring but this time I quietly watched the contractors at work. I did not interfere with the workers. This time, the contractors spent 1.5 hours clearing and washing the gutters. I did ask the worker for before/after photographs. Some contractors don't like homeowners watching them work. But it's my house and my money so I'm going to observe. If there are trees anywhere near your house, get the gutters cleaned twice a year to avoid roof damage. And get before/after photographs. Don't get gutter guards. They're expensive and they actually make gutter cleaning more difficult. I had them and after a few year I ripped them out. Do some research to learn out why you should avoid LeafFilter gutter guards. I didn't get them.
